TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ian_Khama, title = Ian_Khama, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ian_Khama} }

S.FORM: Ian Khama ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 2, Ian Khama, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1953) mrhuw Botswana ta' misuw hya' ga Ian Khama, aring ryax tay 1 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2008 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Ian Khama ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 2, Ian Khama, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1953) mrhuw Botswana ta' misuw hya' ga Ian Khama, aring ryax tay 1 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2008 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: ian kħama rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ian kħama, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw βots~ɕwana taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ian kħama, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
